arguments.argument:
event_inherited() makeActive() setCollisionBounds(-10,-31,10,-1) animSpd=0.1 image_speed=animSpd
//Enemy base statistics eName="Boomerang Bro" eLevel=5 maxLife=230 life=maxLife pointWorth=9 atkPower=4 resType[1]=2 resType[2]=4 resType[3]=2 baseItemChance=50 baseDropIndex=90 affiliation=1 runAcc=0.5
throwTime=35 throwDelay=65 boomSpam=0 bEnraged=0
jeremyText="Definitely the quirkiest of the Bro koopa family. It throws a boomerang that arcs out and then comes back toward the Bro that threw it. The speed at which the boomerang is thrown is dependent on how close you are. The farther away, the faster it is. At least if you destroy the Bro that threw it, the boomerang itself is destroyed, or rather, it falls." chaoText="I don't like their boomerang. It's really weird to me. These guys don't seem to care much either. Sure they do the enrage thing the other bros do, but I feel like they do it simply because they have nothing else better to do." devText="The Boomerang Bro wasn't added into the game until much later in development. It had quite a few votes to be put in though and I knew where their unique weapon would be useful for the game's purpose." extraInfo="Will become indifferent if his bros are beaten close by."
